events.title: Hack the Campus 2026
events.organizer: AI Society and Department of Computer Science
events.audience: Open to all undergraduate students in teams of 2 to 4
events.description: A one-day campus hackathon focused on student productivity, accessibility, and sustainability challenges.

events.title: Resume Clinic for Final Years
events.audience: Final-year students preparing for placements and internships
events.description: A guided workshop on resume structure, portfolio links, ATS-friendly formatting, and recruiter screening expectations.

events.title: Startup Demo Day
events.audience: Students interested in startups, product management, and venture funding
events.description: Student startup teams present validated ideas to alumni founders, mentors, and the campus incubation committee.
